'''yapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imitatively|imitatively]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-p-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imitatively|imitatively]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yapate|yapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yapatesher|yapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yapatesherĂ«m|yapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yapatero|yapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yapateshĂ«|yapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yapateshĂ«m|yapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyapatero|gokiyapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyapateshĂ«|gokiyapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyapateshĂ«m|gokiyapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyapankerom|goyapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyapankeshĂ«|goyapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyapankeshĂ«m|goyapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyapankeya|goyapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yapaterom|yapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yapatemu|yapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yapateya|yapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyapaterom|gokiyapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyapatemu|gokiyapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyapateya|gokiyapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yapapate|yapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yapapatesher|yapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yapapatesherĂ«m|yapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yapapatero|yapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yapapateshĂ«|yapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yapapateshĂ«m|yapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyapapatero|gokiyapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyapapateshĂ«|gokiyapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyapapateshĂ«m|gokiyapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyapapankerom|goyapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyapapankeshĂ«|goyapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyapapankeshĂ«m|goyapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyapapankeya|goyapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yapapaterom|yapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yapapatemu|yapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yapapateya|yapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyapapaterom|gokiyapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyapapatemu|gokiyapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyapapateya|gokiyapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠpĂŠte|yĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠpĂŠtesher|yĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠpĂŠtero|yĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠpĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠpĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠpĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠpĂŠterom|yĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠpĂŠtemu|yĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠpĂŠteya|yĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠpĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠpĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafpafte|yafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafpaftesher|yafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafpaftesherĂ«m|yafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafpaftero|yafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafpafteshĂ«|yafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafpafteshĂ«m|yafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafpaftero|gokiyafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafpafteshĂ«|gokiyafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafpafteshĂ«m|gokiyafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafpafnkerom|goyafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafpafnkeshĂ«|goyafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafpafnkeshĂ«m|goyafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafpafnkeya|goyafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafpafterom|yafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafpaftemu|yafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafpafteya|yafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafpafterom|gokiyafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafpaftemu|gokiyafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafpafteya|gokiyafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
